request.prompt:
Verify exactly one K-pop event candidate using web search. Do not bundle another event.

Candidate ID: discovery-monsta-x-october-13-2026
Artist: MONSTA X
Claimed dates: October 13, 2026
Claimed venue: (venue name listed on Live Nation/Ticketmaster as Great Canadian Toronto per Billboard)
Claimed city/country: Toronto, ON, Canada
Raw candidate title: MONSTA X live event at (venue name listed on Live Nation/Ticketmaster as Great Canadian Toronto per Billboard) on October 13, 2026

Strict evidence rules (do not relax): exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence; accept only an official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing, or reliable media source; artist AND exact date(s) must match (timezone tolerance only ±1 day); venue/city must not conflict; a general tour announcement without this stop/date is not a match. Return UNCONFIRMED if no qualifying source is found and CONTRADICTED if reliable evidence conflicts.

Return only these compact fields, in this order. Cite factual claims with the web-search citation mechanism:
VERDICT: CONFIRMED | UNCONFIRMED | CONTRADICTED
ARTIST_MATCH: true | false
DATE_MATCH: true | false
VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH: true | false
MATCHED_DATES: ...
SOURCE_QUALITY: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media | none
SOURCE_URLS: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.title: Monsta X - Great Canadian Casino Resort Toronto
2026 monsta x world tour [the x : nexus] in toronto
MONSTA X Tickets, 2026-2027 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster
MONSTA X concert - Toronto, The Theatre at Great Canadian Toronto, Oct 10, 2026, 8:00 PM 🎤
2026 monsta x world tour [the x : nexus] in toronto
2026 MONSTA X WORLD TOUR [THE X : NEXUS] IN TORONTO - NOW Toronto
MONSTA X Tickets Toronto (The Theatre at Great Canadian Toronto) on 10/10/2026 at 8:00 PM | Spotify
MONSTA X Toronto Tickets | October 10, 2026 | StubHub
MONSTA X at Great Canadian Toronto (10 Oct 2026)
MONSTA X - 2026 Tour Dates & Concert Schedule

SOURCE_QUALITY: ticketing, venue, promoter
SOURCE_URLS: https://greatcanadian.com/event/2026-monsta-x/, https://www.ticketmaster.com/monsta-x-tickets/artist/2371302, https://www.livenation.com/event/1A8Zk3eGkeX5KW3/2026-monsta-x-world-tour-the-x-nexus-in-toronto, https://www.livenation.com/artist/K8vZ9174TNV/monsta-x-events
REASON: Multiple authoritative sources — the venue (Great Canadian), Ticketmaster, and the Live Nation event detail page — all consistently list the Toronto show as **October 10, 2026**, not October 13;
